code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_nums(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        if has
          if neg
            nums = list.push(nums, 0 - current)
          else
            nums = list.push(nums, current)
          end
          current = 0
          has = false
          neg = false
        end
      else if b == 45
        neg = true
      else if b == 43
        ()
      else
        current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
        has = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      nums = list.push(nums, 0 - current)
    else
      nums = list.push(nums, current)
    end
  end
  nums
end

fn build_output(_ nums: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut sum = 0
  mut idx = 0
  let m = nums.len()
  while idx < m
    match nums.get(idx)
    when Some(v)
      sum = sum + v
      if idx == 0
        out = "#{sum}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{sum}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  out
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let nums = parse_nums(line)
  println(build_output(nums))
when None
  println("")
end
